CREATE TABLE largestTriangleThreeBuckets_test (x Float64, y Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY x;
SELECT largestTriangleThreeBuckets(3)(x, y) FROM largestTriangleThreeBuckets_test WHERE x IS NOT NULL AND y IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE largestTriangleThreeBuckets_test2 (x Float64, y Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY x;
SELECT largestTriangleThreeBuckets(4)(t1.x, t1.y) FROM largestTriangleThreeBuckets_test AS t1 JOIN largestTriangleThreeBuckets_test2 AS t2 ON t1.x < t2.x;
CREATE TABLE time_series_test (event_time DateTime, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_time;
SELECT largestTriangleThreeBuckets(1)(x, y) FROM (SELECT x, y FROM largestTriangleThreeBuckets_test UNION ALL SELECT x, y FROM largestTriangleThreeBuckets_test2) AS combined;
SELECT largestTriangleThreeBuckets(5)(x, y) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT x, y FROM largestTriangleThreeBuckets_test WHERE y > 15);
SELECT largestTriangleThreeBuckets(1)(x, y) FROM largestTriangleThreeBuckets_test HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
